module_summary: Interlearn indexes cross-repo solution documents and provides search and audit capabilities for institutional knowledge reuse.

now.title: Harden indexing robustness for inconsistent frontmatter and malformed markdown.
Improve audit signal quality so coverage gaps are high-confidence.

next.title: Improve search ranking quality for practical debugging and implementation queries.
Refine metadata taxonomy across category, tags, and module attribution fields.
Integrate with review and planning workflows to surface indexed knowledge proactively.

later.title: Add feedback loops for low-value hits to iteratively improve ranking.
Track reuse impact metrics across modules and sprint cycles.
Package compact context bundles for downstream agents and tooling.
